**By renu vinod**

* * *

Please read this [article](http://www.indianexpress.com/full_story.php?content_id=88694) by Sonu Jain in the Indian Express if you are interested in knowing about good intentions having remained just that, without any active implementation. The previous budget had, among other projects, come up with three big schemes for rural development. What is the progress you ask? Sonu Jain has given a decent picture.
